model_shown: KAMA S6 — Gasoline Cargo Mini Van, LHD
family_match_rationale: Serie S covers cargo van S6-S8 + passenger SP6-SP8. S6 is a cargo mini van, LHD, gasoline — body type, cabin config and class match the family spec. Representative cargo-van hero for the SKU.
rights_source: KAMA Auto export brand site — footer names Shandong KAMA Automobile Manufacturing Co., Ltd. as parent; self-hosted product photography (registry ratified 2026-07-08)
source_note: Source is a kamaauto.cn MARKETING POSTER (baked-in title text + spec callouts + composited warehouse/skyline background). The vehicle within is a real photograph; poster text sits on the background, NOT on the product. Cropped to the vehicle region (790x545, box L330 T495 W790 H545) BEFORE upscale — no poster text crosses the vehicle silhouette. This is a Register C restoration (crop + faithful enlargement + extraction + Route-1 staging), not a reinvention.
preflight: PASS — 3/4 front angle, no occlusions crossing silhouette, no platform watermark on product. Raw van crop long edge 790px; crisp_upscale (faithful enlargement, Register C permitted) to 3160x2180 before extraction; staged cutout bbox long edge 2644px, clears 1200px floor.
